action.reasoning: Observation: Got an unrelated error - 'inspect' module name shadowing because I named my file 'inspect.py'. The Python file 'inspect.py' is being imported instead of stdlib inspect. Need to delete or rename inspect.py. Then run training. Decision: remove inspect.py and run training.
